title: Uncaged
subTitle: A sleepwalking teen attaches a camera to himself at night. Later, he finds out a dark secret about his family from the footage.

title: American Animals
subTitle: Four friends hatch a plan to carry out an audacious heist, stealing books that are worth millions from a college library.

title: Huge Shark
subTitle: As the ocean currents change, a deadly cold-blooded killer enters the environment. Disruption ensues when an expert is invited to investigate the situation.

title: Chef vs Fridge
subTitle: Thinking outside the box is not going to cut it. These chefs must think inside the mystery refrigerator to prove their culinary skills and creativity.

title: Filler
subTitle: Music fills the world with love, bridging gaps between souls and connecting us to the Supreme. Through songs, people unite for a better world, spreading peace, hope, and understanding.

title: Jeepers Creepers 2
subTitle: A bus carrying a high school basketball team suffers a flat tyre following the kidnapping of Billy Taggar. Trouble ensues when those on board encounter the Creeper, a demonic winged creature.

title: Corner Office
subTitle: Orson is an office employee who believes his strict work ethic will help him ascend the corporate ladder. One day, he discovers an elegantly decorated room that his colleagues believe does not exist.

title: King
subTitle: Raja and his father, who live in Hong Kong, are devastated when an accident leaves the latter on the verge of death. He decides to reunite his father with his grandfather in order to make him happy.

subTitle: A former soldier along with his teammates sets out on a mission to battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the Korean peninsula wastelands.

title: Pressure
subTitle: A group of divers are recruited to repair an oil pipeline at a seabed. However, when the vessel that carries the divers' pod sinks in a storm, the divers get stuck at the bottom of the sea.

title: Vice
subTitle: Dick Cheney embarks on an ambitious journey, evolving from a mere bureaucratic official in Washington to becoming an influential vice president under George W Bush.

title: Perfect Nanny
subTitle: Myriam decides to return to work at a law firm and hires a nanny, Louise, to look after her children. However, a treacherous web of mutual dependence soon forms between Louise, Myriam and her family.

title: Tai Chi Hero
subTitle: Lu Chan is still trying to find his place in his new home, but his presence in Chen Village triggers a curse on the town.

title: Nowhere to Hide
subTitle: Military-industrial thugs kill a Marine (Daniel Hugh Kelly) to keep him quiet, but his ex-Marine wife (Amy Madigan) fights back.

title: Gunpowder Milkshake
subTitle: Three generations of hitwomen fight for survival against a criminal firm and try to protect what is most important to them.

title: The Mauritanian
subTitle: A wrongfully detained man, Mohamedou Ould, fights for freedom as his lawyer uncovers shocking truths, exposing injustice inside a secretive prison system.

subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

subTitle: A man takes extreme steps to protect Maggie, his daughter, who is slowly turning into a cannibal after a zombie attack. He spends time with her, reminiscing about her childhood, dreading the future.

subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

subTitle: Wendy, a young woman with autism, runs away from her caregiver and embarks on a journey of a lifetime in order to submit her manuscript to a screenwriting competition.

subTitle: A biology teacher tries to win the Teacher of the Year award in order to continue the legacy of his father, who worked at the same school and won the title every year.

subTitle: The true story of the inseparable Von Erich brothers, who made history in the intensely competitive world of professional wrestling in the early 1980s.
